PROP-01b-partial-inv-024.text: All feed IDs must be allowlisted before bulk verification in transmit().
PROP-01b-partial-inv-024.assertion: forall transmit(reports): forall r in reports: feedIdToAsset[r.feedId] != address(0)

locations.note: feedIdToAsset lookup per report in bulk loop; address(0) check gates processing
